merged_events.event_description: Ambassador Sally Angela Shelton presented credentials as the first U.S. Ambassador to Dominica, remaining resident in Bridgetown, Barbados — establishing nonresident ambassadorial relations.

evidence.quote: The United States maintains no official presence in Dominica. The Ambassador and the Embassy staff are resident at Bridgetown, Barbados.
Ambassador Sally Angela Shelton presented credentials at Bridgetown, Barbados, where she remained resident.

merged_events.event_description: U.S. ambassadorial relations with Dominica established when the first Ambassador, Sally Angela Shelton (resident in Bridgetown, Barbados), presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Sally Angela Shelton, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1979-05-17. Credentials presented: 1979-07-18. Left Bridgetown 1981-02-14. Note: Also Special Representative to Antigua, St. Christopher-Nevis-Anguilla, and St. Vincent.

matched.notes: Both extracted events refer to the same transition: establishment of nonresident ambassadorial relations via Sally Angela Shelton's credential presentation. RDCR (Event 0) gives only year-level precision (1979); POCOM (Event 1) provides the exact date 1979-07-18. Since RDCR lacks a specific institutional date, POCOM's credential presentation date applies per source priority rules. CSV date matches POCOM exactly.
